fields.title: Data Cleaning Checklist
fields.summary: A practical checklist for preparing high-quality datasets before analysis.
fields.description: Provides a systematic workflow for identifying missing values, duplicates, outliers, inconsistent formats, invalid records and data quality issues before performing analysis.

fields.title: Exploratory Data Analysis Worksheet
fields.summary: Worksheet for performing structured exploratory data analysis (EDA).
fields.description: Guides analysts through descriptive statistics, distribution analysis, correlation assessment, missing value evaluation and visualization planning before modelling.

fields.title: Machine Learning Model Evaluation Template
fields.summary: Standard template for evaluating machine learning model performance.
fields.description: Provides sections for recording model assumptions, training results, validation metrics, confusion matrices, ROC curves and recommendations for improvement.

fields.title: Dashboard Planning Framework
fields.summary: Framework for planning business intelligence dashboards and reporting solutions.
fields.description: Helps analysts define business objectives, KPIs, stakeholders, visualization strategies, dashboard layouts and reporting schedules before implementation.
